pr_title: Add lever_type and decision_axis to lever schema
pr_description: Add `lever_type` field (methodology/execution/governance/dissemination/product/operations) to classify each lever's category Add `decision_axis` field requiring a one-sentence description of the controllable choice ("This lever controls X by choosing between A, B, and C") Validators: type normalization + rejection of invalid types, minimum 20-char length for decision axis New system prompt section 2 ("Lever Classification") guides the LLM on both fields Both fields propagate through `Lever` → `LeverCleaned` → JSON output Implements proposals 1+2 from `docs/proposals/119-lever-pipeline-impl.md` (section 3.1).
